name: The final showdown between Vanilla for All vs Cuck for one!
description:
“You may have heard these words before but let me show you what they really mean! Go beyond. PLUS ULTRA!”

Go past your limits for the Anti-NTR Society!

Based off the Ratatat74 MHA NTRs

Background: In an alternate universe where Izuku Midoriya still manages to defeat Shigiraki and got to keep One for All, the same could not be said about All for One who was able to find a way to stop Eri’s quirk from rewinding him into nothingness and stay in his prime. With All for One being in his prime and having collected so many quirks now, he was able to easily dispatch of all the remaining pro heroes by either killing them or enslaving them. With all hope seemingly lost, there is now only one vigilante that can save them all.

Personal yap: So I never finished MHA. I dropped is end of season 4 because the fandom ruined it so I am going off by the clips I’ve watched. I’m genuinely thinking of picking it back up now just because of the amazing edits I’ve seen of the final battle and because I used to be a huge fan of MHA before all that. Anyways, my editor is helping me out this time meaning that there will be a better difference in writing.

So I just realized, my link has NOT been linking for the previous bots when doing the discord link so oops! Here’s the link for reals this time

-The Anti-NTR Society-
creator: CLONE
